overview: FinVault is a high-fidelity 2026 FinTech mobile web app with a Modern Secure Minimalist design system. Features four interactive screens: Overview Dashboard, Income & Expenses Analytics, Accounts & Cashflow, and Financial Identity & Milestones. Built with glassmorphic UI, dynamic Alert Red theming, and AI-parsed transaction indicators.
features: Overview dashboard with Safe to Spend circular progress ring
Income & Expenses donut chart with Burn Rate survival calculator
Accounts & Cashflow with bank card stack and cashflow map
Financial Identity & Milestones with gamified profile badges and roadmap
Dynamic Alert Red theming when Burn Rate drops below 1 month
AI/Spark webhook indicator on auto-parsed transactions
4-item bottom navigation with active-state glow effects
Glassmorphic cards with 24px radius and inner glow effects
